news.t: NVDA Drives TTEQ and TGRW to Top ETF Returns
10 T. Rowe Price ETFs Cross $1 Billion in AUM

holdings.infoBox: TGRW is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.39%, Apple at 10.78%, Microsoft at 9.14%, Alphabet at 8.73%, and Broadcom at 6.36%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Growth Stock ETF (TGRW) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 991.36m in AUM and 74 holdings. TGRW is an actively-managed, non-transparent fund that focus on companies with growth characteristics TGRW was launched on Aug 4, 2020 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: NVDA Drives TTEQ and TGRW to Top ETF Returns
data.text: Three T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (TROW) ETFs cleared 8% returns last month, according to ETF Database. Out front was the T.

data.title: 10 T. Rowe Price ETFs Cross $1 Billion in AUM
data.text: In a notable milestone, T. Rowe Price now holds ten ETFs with $1 billion in AUM.

data.title: McGhee: Growth stocks tend to do better than value in a recessionary period
data.text: Tiffany McGhee, CEO and CIO of Pivotal Advisors, lays out the trading day ahead.
